frames.description: The scene shows the side of a large pink building with several barred windows and air conditioning units. A man in a white shirt stands near a black metal fence topped with barbed wire. A white car roof is prominent in the foreground. Infrastructure includes lamp posts and electrical wires.
The perspective shifts slightly to the right. The man in white remains in place. More of the pink building's facade is revealed, including more AC units and a triple-head lamp post.
The man in the white shirt is now seen talking on a mobile phone. The camera continues its slow rightward movement along the building's exterior.
The scene is largely unchanged, focusing on the man on the phone and the architectural details of the pink building. A small 'NO PARKING' sign in yellow and blue is visible on the fence.
The camera maintains its steady rightward pan. The fence, AC units, and building facade remain constant. The man in white is still on his phone.
A motorcyclist with a passenger enters the frame from the left. The man in white continues his phone conversation near the red pillar of the fence.
The motorcycle moves further into the frame. The background remains the same pink building and black fence.
The first motorcycle moves out of view to the right, and a second person on a blue scooter enters from the left. The man in white is still visible by the fence.
The person on the blue scooter passes behind the foreground car roof. The camera continues panning right.
The man in white has moved away. A pedestrian in a blue shirt walks along the sidewalk behind the fence. The scooter continues its path.
A new motorcycle with a rider in a pink shirt and a cyclist in a blue shirt enter the frame. The camera is approaching a street corner.
The cyclist and motorcyclist proceed along the road. More traffic police barricades are visible near the corner.
The camera reaches the corner of the pink building. A digital traffic sign and several 'KOLKATA TRAFFIC POLICE' barricades are visible. An orange-shirted motorcyclist is stopped near the corner.
The camera turns slightly to face an intersection. A large black digital sign reads 'AVOID HONKING'. Pedestrian zebra crossings are visible on the road surface. A cyclist passes by.

A wider view of the street intersection. The pink building on the left is identified by a sign as 'ALL INDIA INSTITUTE OF HYGIENE AND PUBLIC HEALTH'. A billboard is visible on the right side of the street.
The camera moves forward into the intersection. The billboard on the right shows a health or political advertisement with multiple people. A handcart pusher is visible on the far right.

The camera pans past a blue wall. A large yellow billboard promotes polio vaccination: 'পোলিও রবিবার' (Polio Sunday), 'দুই বুঁদ জিন্দেগী কি' (Two drops for life) in Bengali, featuring a picture of a baby. Behind it is the 'ADMINISTRATIVE BUILDING SCHOOL OF TROPICAL MEDICINE KOLKATA'.

The camera moves along a grey wall with lush green trees. A 'No Honking' sign and a vertical commercial billboard for 'THE INC...' with the number '9830012199' are present. A man operates a small roadside stall.
A large white neoclassical archway comes into view. A pedestrian with a blue umbrella walks near the entrance. Blue and white striped barricades line the sidewalk.

The camera passes a roadside memorial/tribute shelter. It features a portrait and Bengali text: 'কলকাতা পৌরসংস্থার শ্রদ্ধাঞ্জলি' (Tribute from Kolkata Municipal Corporation). The awning is green and white striped.
The scene moves past white pillars of a building with visible red pipes running along the base. A man in a white shirt walks on the sidewalk behind a blue and white wavy fence.

The camera arrives at 'GATE 7' of a hospital. A large vertical pillar sign in Bengali reads 'মেডিকেল কলেজ হাসপাতাল কলকাতা' (Medical College Hospital Kolkata). A blue car is parked inside the gated compound.
The camera moves past the hospital entrance. A tree trunk partially obscures the view. A rickshaw or cycle-van is parked behind the blue and white fence.
A blue-painted building with barred windows is visible behind trees and red pipes. A person in a white dress walks on the far right.
The camera continues along the blue building. Several women in formal or nursing attire are walking along the sidewalk. The text 'RAJA DEBEN...' is partially visible on the building facade.
The camera pans past roadside tea and food stalls sheltered by black plastic tarps. People are gathered around the stalls. Red industrial pipes are prominent along the building wall.

The camera reaches another main entrance of 'মেডিকেল কলেজ হাসপাতাল কলকাতা' (Medical College Hospital Kolkata). Crowds of people are entering and leaving the hospital grounds. A security booth is on the right.
A view into the busy hospital courtyard through a large gate. A man in a green shirt on a bicycle and a person with a green umbrella are visible. Modern glass-fronted buildings are in the background.
The camera moves along a blue building with tall white Corinthian columns. More informal roadside stalls under tarps are set up on the sidewalk behind the blue and white fence.
The final frame shows the continuation of the blue building with tall white columns. People walk along the street, and various stalls are visible under the columned portico.
